prompt: An athletic sorceress with a determined expression, wearing a tailored black dress with cut-outs and a high-pointed witch's hat with a glowing magenta ribbon. Long blonde hair flowing under a dark cape lined with deep purple and shimmering stardust. Holds a pink star-tipped magic wand that emits trails of sparkles. Accompanied by a mystical black cat familiar that surges with cosmic energy. Confident side-profile stance, magical particles swirling around her gloved hands.
